hypothesis: Add item_id x store_id smoothed target encoding (mean sales per item-store pair using training data only with smoothing factor 50) as an additional feature. This directly captures the baseline demand level for each product-store combination, which is the most granular level in the M5 hierarchy. Based on exp_0014 (best=0.97640). Also add item_id x store_id x month target encoding to capture seasonal baseline demand.
